overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone castle fortress. The clip transitions from bright afternoon sunlight through narrow cobblestone passages to open ramparts with mountain vistas at golden hour, then descends into torch-lit corridors as night falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow castle courtyard passage with wooden construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow stone corridors between high castle walls

entered.detail: rough-hewn medieval stone wall forming the left corridor boundary
rough-hewn stone wall with wooden beam supports on the right
wooden construction scaffolding with planks leaning against the wall
irregular cobblestone ground surface forming the walkway
stone archway passage leading to the next section of the castle

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed stone corridor with high walls on both sides. Wooden scaffolding and construction materials line the left wall as the path leads toward a distant stone archway. Bright afternoon sunlight casts sharp shadows across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle rampart walkway with crenellated battlements

events.description: exits narrow stone passage onto open castle rampart with expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking along the castle ramparts as expansive mountain views open up to the left

entered.detail: crenellated stone battlements overlooking the valley below
wooden plank walkway along the edge of the ramparts
snow-capped mountain range visible in the far distance
tall stone watch tower with conical roof rising from the castle walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens onto a castle rampart with crenellated battlements on the left revealing expansive mountain vistas. The character walks along wooden platforms with a stone tower visible in the distance while the right wall continues alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open vista overlook with mountain views

events.description: sun begins to set, casting warm golden hour light across the mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking across wooden platforms overlooking the vast valley and distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: distinctive snow-capped mountain peak emerging through clouds

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an open vista point with unobstructed views of the mountain range. The lighting shifts to golden hour as the sun sets, casting long shadows and warm tones across the wooden platforms and stone battlements. Distant peaks emerge through scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway between high walls with torch lighting

events.description: transition from dusk to night, artificial torchlight becomes the primary illumination
begins ascending stone stairs between narrow walls

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs as daylight fades and warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between the castle walls
lit torch mounted on the stone wall casting warm orange light
fortified stone gatehouse with crenellated roof visible ahead

segments.scene_description: As dusk settles into night, the character enters a narrow stairway between high stone walls. Wall-mounted torches provide the primary light source, casting flickering shadows. The distant mountains fade from view as the ascent continues toward a stone gatehouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow castle corridor with torch lighting

events.description: enters fully enclosed narrow corridor with wooden gate structure

agents.ego_description: navigating dark narrow corridors lit only by sporadic wall-mounted torches

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron fittings set into the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Now in full night, the character moves through narrow enclosed corridors where torchlight provides the only illumination. The stone gatehouse looms closer ahead, and wooden doors line the passage walls. The environment is completely sheltered from the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor that gradually opens into a wide castle rampart overlooking a mountain range. It begins within a narrow passage enclosed by high walls, where bright afternoon sunlight casts sharp shadows across cobblestones and wooden scaffolding. As the character advances toward a distant stone archway, the claustrophobic space gives way to an expansive outdoor vista. The scene then opens onto the ramparts, shifting from the enclosed walls to crenellated battlements and wooden platforms. Finally, the camera tracks along the fortification, revealing a distant stone tower set against a backdrop of sweeping mountains.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched mountain vista into the oppressive darkness of a fortified stone interior. It begins at an open vista point where the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour, casting long shadows across wooden platforms and stone battlements as distant peaks emerge through scattered clouds. As dusk settles into night, the camera follows the character into a narrow stairway between high stone walls, where the mountain views fade and flickering wall-mounted torches become the primary light source. The scene then shifts into full night as the camera moves through enclosed corridors sheltered from the sky, passing wooden doors under the sole illumination of torchlight. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the fortress as a stone gatehouse looms closer ahead.
